data.description:
## Reproduction Steps
1. infra/compose/docker-compose.yml declares `gerrit_reviewbot_tickets: external: true` (added by 10837ca88) with a comment claiming compose-up.sh creates it.
2. infra/scripts/compose-up.sh's two provisioning loops hardcode `for d in git index cache db etc logs plugins reviewbot` — no reviewbot-tickets entry, and the `gerrit_${d}` pattern cannot express the hyphen/underscore split (volume gerrit_reviewbot_tickets ↔ dir reviewbot-tickets).
3. On a fresh box (or post `docker volume rm`), `docker compose up` fails: external volume not found — the mechanism behind incident 2731.

**Expected:** compose-up.sh provisions every external volume the compose file references. **Actual:** the tickets volume is never created; box was hand-fixed on 2026-07-10.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] compose-up.sh creates /var/gerrit/site/reviewbot-tickets and volume gerrit_reviewbot_tickets (bind, matching sibling opts), via a volume:dir pair mapping (not the bare `gerrit_${d}` pattern).
- [ ] Idempotent: safe re-run on the live box (volume already exists).
- [ ] File paths: infra/scripts/compose-up.sh.
data.title: compose-up.sh omits the gerrit_reviewbot_tickets external volume (deploy-blocking drift with docker-compose.yml)
